mapper.sql: fa.id, fa.application_case_id, users.id AS user_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.status AS application_status, ac.is_favorite, fa.fit_score, fa.matched_skills, fa.missing_skills, fa.recommended_study, fa.recommended_certificates, fa.strategy, fa.source_snapshot, fa.score_basis, fa.gap_recommendations, fa.certificate_recommendations, fa.strategy_actions, fa.condition_matrix, fa.analysis_confidence, fa.apply_decision, fa.model, fa.prompt_version, fa.status, fa.error_message, fa.created_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo_count_source WHERE memo_count_source.fit_analysis_id = fa.id AND memo_count_source.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS memo_count, ( SELECT MAX(latest_memo.updated_at) FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo latest_memo WHERE latest_memo.fit_analysis_id = fa.id AND latest_memo.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS latest_memo_at, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo reanalysis_memo WHERE reanalysis_memo.fit_analysis_id = fa.id AND reanalysis_memo.memo_type = 'REANALYSIS' AND reanalysis_memo.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS reanalysis_requested, gr.gate_status, gr.needs_human_review AS gate_needs_human_review, gr.reason_count AS gate_reason_count, gr.max_severity AS gate_max_severity, gr.evidence_gate_version, gr.gate_reasons_json, gr.review_status AS gate_review_status, gr.reviewed_at AS gate_reviewed_at, reviewer.name AS gate_reviewer_name

AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
AND gr.gate_status = 'REVIEW_REQUIRED'
AND ( ac.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{c.query}, '%') OR ac.job_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{c.query}, '%') OR users.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{c.query}, '%') OR users.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{c.query}, '%') )
AND fa.fit_score >= 80 AND fa.fit_score >= 70 AND fa.fit_score < 80 AND fa.fit_score >= 50 AND fa.fit_score < 70 AND fa.fit_score < 50
AND fa.status = 'SUCCESS' AND (fa.status IS NULL OR fa.status != 'SUCCESS')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo_filter WHERE memo_filter.fit_analysis_id = fa.id AND memo_filter.deleted_at IS NULL )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo reanalysis_filter WHERE reanalysis_filter.fit_analysis_id = fa.id AND reanalysis_filter.memo_type = 'REANALYSIS' AND reanalysis_filter.deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id LEFT JOIN fit_analysis_gate_result gr ON gr.fit_analysis_id = fa.id

SELECT
FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id LEFT JOIN fit_analysis_gate_result gr ON gr.fit_analysis_id = fa.id LEFT JOIN users reviewer ON reviewer.id = gr.reviewed_by WHERE fa.id = #{id} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT gr.gate_status, gr.review_status, gr.max_severity, gr.gate_reasons_json FROM fit_analysis_gate_result gr INNER JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = gr.fit_analysis_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE fit_analysis_gate_result SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, reviewed_by = #{adminUserId}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fit_analysis active_fit INNER JOIN application_case active_case ON active_case.id = active_fit.application_case_id INNER JOIN users active_user ON active_user.id = active_case.user_id WHERE active_fit.id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL AND active_user.status != 'DELETED' AND active_user.deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT memo.id, memo.fit_analysis_id, memo.admin_user_id, admin_user.name AS admin_name, admin_user.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo INNER JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = memo.admin_user_id INNER JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = memo.fit_analysis_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users target_user ON target_user.id = ac.user_id WHERE memo.fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND memo.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND target_user.status != 'DELETED' AND target_user.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY memo.updated_at DESC, memo.id DESC

SELECT memo.id, memo.fit_analysis_id, memo.admin_user_id, admin_user.name AS admin_name, admin_user.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo INNER JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = memo.admin_user_id INNER JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = memo.fit_analysis_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users target_user ON target_user.id = ac.user_id WHERE memo.id = #{id} AND memo.fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND memo.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND target_user.status != 'DELETED' AND target_user.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_fit_analysis_memo (fit_analysis_id, admin_user_id, memo_type, content) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{adminUserId}, #{memoType}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_fit_analysis_memo SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id} AND fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fit_analysis active_fit INNER JOIN application_case active_case ON active_case.id = active_fit.application_case_id INNER JOIN users active_user ON active_user.id = active_case.user_id WHERE active_fit.id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL AND active_user.status != 'DELETED' AND active_user.deleted_at IS NULL )
